/sbin/cc -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ttyprland.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ttyprland.dir/impl/main.c.o CMakeFiles/ttyprland.dir/impl/server.c.o CMakeFiles/ttyprland.dir/impl/server_graphics.c.o CMakeFiles/ttyprland.dir/impl/server_input.c.o CMakeFiles/ttyprland.dir/impl/server_output.c.o CMakeFiles/ttyprland.dir/impl/server_protocols.c.o CMakeFiles/ttyprland.dir/impl/server_scene.c.o -o ttyprland  -lwlroots-0.21 -lwayland-server -lm -lxkbcommon
